_doc: Google Store Trade-In max published values per model id. Refreshed weekly by scripts/refresh-google-comps.py via .github/workflows/refresh-comps.yml. Frontend reads this at runtime when device is in the Google family (pixel / pixelwatch / google_tab). CONVENTION: only include a model when Google's actual trade-in calculator lists it. Current-generation flagships (within ~6 months of launch) are usually NOT accepted yet — leave them out and the frontend renders a 'Google won't trade this — we will' badge instead. Adding an entry implies the value was actually scraped from store.google.com/us/buy/trade-in.
